
func (s *Server) handlePageFeedGETStreamAnon(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if !s.checkIsDSReq(w, r) {
		return
	}
	sess, sessToken, ok := s.auth(w, r)
	if !ok {
		return
	}

	if sess.UserID != "" {
		s.httpErrBad(w, "authenticated client on anonymous stream", nil)
		return
	}

	p := testapp.PageFeed{
	App: s.app,
}
	s.handleStreamRequest(w, r, sessToken, sess, evSubjPageFeed(sess.UserID), func(
		sse *datastar.ServerSentEventGenerator, ch <-chan msgbroker.Message,
	) {
		for msg := range ch {
			if msg.Subject == EvSubjPostsCreated {
				var e testapp.EventPostsCreated
				if err := json.Unmarshal(msg.Data, &e); err != nil {
					s.logErr("unmarshaling EventPostsCreated JSON", err)
					continue
				}
				if err := p.OnPostsCreated(e, sse); err != nil {
					s.logErr("handling PageFeed.OnPostsCreated", err)
				}
			}
		}
	})
}
